class.name: FestivalNPC
class.brief_description: A live islander placed in a scene.
class.description: Wraps a [FestivalNPCProfile], keeps its current schedule state in sync with [FestivalClock] and [FestivalWeather], and exposes a one-call [method interact] that runs the [FestivalDirector] perception resolver and returns the reaction.

members.member: The authoring data backing this NPC.

signal.name: state_changed
signal.description: Emitted when the NPC's schedule state changes because the phase, weather or run changed.

signal.name: interacted
signal.description: Emitted after [method interact], carrying the resolved reaction.
